motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def isPrefixString(self, s: str, words: List[str]) -> bool:
        prefix = ""
        for word in words:
            prefix += word
            if prefix == s:
                return True
            elif prefix > s:
                return False
        return False
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n*m)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
